cues.label: The path
cues.headline: One shared list of choices
cues.narration: You carry a single path list holding the choices made so far; every node is a subset.

cues.label: Choose
cues.headline: Append an element
cues.narration: Choose pushes the current element onto the path, then recurses one level deeper.

cues.label: Record a copy
cues.headline: Snapshot at every node
cues.narration: Every node is a valid subset, so record a copy of the path — never the live list.

cues.label: Un-choose
cues.headline: Pop it back off
cues.narration: When the branch is done, pop the element so the path is restored for the next branch.

cues.label: Start index
cues.headline: Only look forward
cues.narration: Looping from a start index forward is why each subset appears once, in increasing order.

cues.label: Balanced
cues.headline: Every push had a pop
cues.narration: At the end the path is empty again — a matching pop for every push means no state leaked.
